dialogos.texto_en: Huff... *wheeze*\nD-did we manage to escape?
Yes, we're safe now.\nThey didn't follow us after all.
Huff... Puff...\nThis is...quite...troublesome...
Whew...\nIt's inevitable we'll stand out\nwhen all five of us are together.
Well, no wonder you stand out...\nYou even coordinated your hair and clothes.
We didn't attract attention\nwhen we were visiting the aquarium, though.
The lighting near the tanks were dimmed,\nand other people were also focused on the exhibits.
What should we do now?\nIf we keep this up,\nwe won't be able to enjoy any sightseeing.
Looks like the only option is to split up.
Yes.\nThere's no other choice.
The park is spacious, and if we split up,\nwe won't draw that much attention.
Then let's decide on a meeting place\nfor later and go our separate ways.
If we're going to move, let's do it quickly.\nIf we stay here too long,\nwe might attract attention again.
That's true.
We still have time, so where should we go first?
*sigh*\nI wish we could take it a bit slower.
Let's avoid crowded areas with a lot of tourists.
Well then, Uesugi-kun.\nSee you later, at this spot.
Yeah, don't cause any trouble, alright?
Right, my turn...
Wh-what's the matter?\nYou can tell just by looking, can't you?
(He's just running his mouth.)
(There's no way he can\n tell the difference between them\n just by seeing them briefly.)
(But I'm different.\n I've been with them\n for almost a year and a half now.)
...Alright!\nI'll find a clue to tell them apart next time!
